art_market.global_sales_outlook: Resilient despite global pressures; strong engagement from domestic collectors in China, Japan, Korea, and Singapore; growth in family offices setting up in Singapore and Hong Kong.
art_market.key_trends: Asia-centric buyer base becoming more prominent; focus on regional engagement and high-value works; stabilization efforts around hubs like Hong Kong.
art_market.recent_events: Art Fair Tokyo recently concluded, showcasing diverse contemporary art; Asia Week New York 2026 is underway; Hong Kong Art Week is active with Art Basel.

stock_market.market_sentiment: High volatility due to geopolitical tensions (US-Iran); however, signs of a potential rebound on March 24 following announcement of postponed military strikes.
stock_market.key_factors: Escalating US-Iran conflict remains the primary driver; oil prices in focus; potential for volatile but recovering start following de-escalation rhetoric.
